findings.description: MiseCleaner::scan_pinned_versions added; cross-checks global config.toml and all .mise.toml (depth 5). E2E test validates pinned version preserved.
remove_with_uchg chflags failure propagated via `?` instead of silent `let _ = ...`.
parse_size_str normalises via to_ascii_uppercase; accepts lowercase and space-separated forms.
find_old_versions filters out empty version keys before max().unwrap() call.
find_old_versions filters out symlinks before processing directory entries.
detect_old_indexes filters out symlinks. 3 unit tests added.
5 edge-case tests added for is_older_than (just-under-threshold, 0 days, now, missing metadata, symlink).
expand_tilde_tilde_alone unit test added for '~' input.
GenericCleaner::clean DeleteDirs path now calls chmod -R nouchg before remove_dir_all.
